end end end U=#y return p(x)end,function(r,Z)local p=F(Z)local O=function(O,a,y)return U(r,{O;a,y},Z,p)end return O end,function()J=(47790+-47789)+J k[J]=242724+-242723 return J end,{},function(r)k[r]=k[r]-(-527634-(-527635))if-271716-(-271716)==k[r]then k[r],W[r]=nil,nil end end,function(r,Z)local p=F(Z)local O=function(O)return U(r,{O},Z,p)end return O end,function(r,Z)local p=F(Z)local O=function(...)return U(r,{...},Z,p)end return O end,function(r,Z)local p=F(Z)local O=function(O,a,y,m,x,W,k)return U(r,{O;a,y,m,x;W,k},Z,p)end return O end return(V(14986685-625327,{}))(p(x))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[Z(-240090+280342)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
